headline: Healthpeak Retains Janus Living Majority Stake While Valuation Gap Persists
summary: Healthpeak Properties (NYSE:DOC) plans to retain an 85.3% ownership stake in Janus Living following Janus Living's initial public offering. The transaction creates a separately listed entity while keeping Janus Living largely under Healthpeak Properties' control after the IPO. This ownership structure represents a significant change in how Healthpeak Properties organizes and reports part of its portfolio. Healthpeak Properties, listed on the NYSE under the ticker DOC, is a real estate...

headline: 20 Years on Wall Street Taught Me: Big Dividend Healthcare Stocks Never Go Out of Style
summary: After a career spanning two decades at Bear Stearns, Lehman Brothers, and Morgan Stanley, I gained an institutional perspective on dividend stock investing. My tenure at these premier Wall Street firms exposed me to fundamental analysis, credit evaluation, and risk management practices that directly translate into selecting high-quality dividend-paying companies. Having witnessed firsthand the 2008 ... 20 Years on Wall Street Taught Me: Big Dividend Healthcare Stocks Never Go Out of Style
